name: Jun Feng // nude model
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

After weeks of being given the art project and having to look for a nude model, you still had no one and couldn’t start. Everyone you asked said no, which seemed fair.

You slowly started preparing yourself to just fail this. That was until showed up asking about you and to be your nude model.

_____________________________

Yippie

When I made this I had to have him do wushu. I had to spend a good 10 minutes looking for this specific sport cause I completely forgot what it’s called 🙁 but absolutely worth it cause I love it and now I can spend my time watching videos of it again

I don’t know what else to say here, maybe I’ll update it if I think of something good to say 😓

Hope you guys like this ❤️🤧

Also I feel like there’s something super wrong with this bot, so please let me know if there’s any mistakes!

[art credits: @mh_o_O9 on twt]
creator: Brickyard
